title: Ratify provenance mechanism + countable assertion unit + currency-normalization + freshness policy
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). The map needs a ratified provenance mechanism, a countable assertion unit for coverage metrics, a currency-normalization rule, and a freshness policy before data ingestion.
objective: Ratify the provenance model (source IRI + license + retrievedAt on every assertion), define the countable assertion unit, the original-currency-canonical normalization rule, and the freshness/staleness policy.
acceptanceCriteria: Provenance mechanism defined: every assertion carries a source IRI + license + retrievedAt.
A countable assertion unit is defined for coverage/metrics.
Currency-normalization policy ratified: original currency + amount kept canonical; any normalized value carries FX rate/source/date.
Freshness/staleness policy defined (refresh cadence + stale records flagged, never silently shown as current).
output: docs/provenance-policy.md documenting the provenance mechanism, assertion unit, currency-normalization rule, and freshness policy, committed via PR.
